---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "NYE 2019"
date: 2019-12-31
summary: '"Just close your eyes, ’cause, baby you never do know<br>And I’ll be on the sidelines with my hands tied,<br>Watching the show" (Aimee Mann)'
---

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
source("gallery.R")
make_gallery()
```
